pattern.imageEvidence: color consultant reviewing paint swatches, fan deck, and room finishes in natural light
pattern.styleContract: Calm and expert with room-light proof, real swatch consultation evidence, warm swatch action accents, and palette support cards as the signature move.

tagline: Paint decisions without the tiny-swatch spiral.

hero.title: HueHaus interior color consultant hero image
hero.alt: A color consultant reviewing paint swatches and fabric samples with a homeowner in a bright living room.

contact.serviceArea: Interior paint palettes, room color consults, trim and cabinet color guidance, exterior accent help, sample reviews, move-in color plans, and refresh consults in River Market, Northside, Oak Hill, Westbrook, and Maple Bend

copy.eyebrow: Interior color consulting with light, samples, and sanity
copy.heroText: HueHaus helps homeowners narrow paint, trim, cabinet, and room palettes using light, finishes, samples, and how the space really gets lived in.
copy.introTitle: A good palette is part taste, part daylight detective work.
copy.introText: We look at natural light, existing finishes, furniture, undertones, room flow, and whether the color needs to calm down or wake things up.
copy.quoteText: Plan the consult with room photos, current finishes, paint questions, and your timeline. We will recommend the consult format and what samples to gather.

services.title: Room Palette Consult
services.text: Paint direction for one or more rooms using light, undertones, furnishings, and finish constraints.

services.title: Whole-Home Flow
services.text: A practical palette map for connected spaces, trim, doors, accents, and transition points.

services.title: Sample Review
services.text: Help reading test swatches in the room before you commit to gallons.

process.title: Send the room context
process.text: Photos, lighting, finishes, furniture, and problem colors help us start smarter.

process.title: Review samples and flow
process.text: We compare undertones, trim, adjacent rooms, and how the palette changes during the day.

process.title: Leave with direction
process.text: You get a short palette plan, sample notes, and what to test before buying paint.

notes: Works: palette support cards. gives the page a memorable shape.

brandBrief.avoidLookingLike: Avoid a generic checklist-urgency recolor; do not repeat stock hero framing, copied card rhythm, or vague local-service claims.

serviceDetails.turnaround: Light check: day and evening shifts considered.
serviceDetails.whatToSend: Send room photos, daylight direction, fixed finishes, current paint questions, inspiration images, sample timing, and the decisions that feel stuck.
serviceDetails.prepNote: Photos, lighting, finishes, furniture, and problem colors help us start smarter.
serviceDetails.serviceRhythm: Calm-consult flow for Interior paint palettes, room color consults, trim and cabinet color guidance, exterior accent help, sample reviews, move-in color plans, and refresh consults in River Market, Northside, Oak Hill, Westbrook, and Maple Bend: room light, fixed finishes, undertones, sample timing, and decision comfort shape the consult before colors are narrowed.
